changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM actions_config WHERE code = 'UPL8' AND version = '1';

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE actions set enabled = true WHERE code = 'UPL8';

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO actions (code, description, enabled, display) VALUES ('UPL10', 'Shepherding livestock on moorland (remove stock for at least 8 months)', TRUE, FALSE);

changeSet.author: system
system
